phaseLog.summary: PO scoped pencil-screen-sync: redesign type, high severity, 24 confirmed + 16 unidentified Pencil frames mapped to Flutter files, Design gate hard-blocking Frontend

Architect produced presentation-only change map (modules A-G + design system, ~150 touchable files). Resolved PO open questions: bottom-nav shell = main_shell.dart + home_bottom_navigation_bar.dart + bottom_nav_item/add_button; live_map_page.dart is UI-chrome-only, live_map_widget.dart off-limits; participants_placeholder_page.dart stays a placeholder. Found t7MYzR Forgot Password has no dedicated page (inline in login_view.dart). Defined hard Design gate, 8-step Frontend order, regression test surface (3 at-risk tests), protected file list. No domain/data/DI/router changes.

40 frames screenshotted from rideglory.pen; all 16 unknown frames resolved; 6 out-of-scope, 10 in-scope; critical correction: ELB5u/eK2WW/heldR are Maintenance Form Step 2 (not registration); PMuA4 is a CTA reference sheet (not a screen); f0lXw is the actual registration detail; full design tokens extracted; per-screen specs written for all confirmed frames

preExistingDirtyTreeNote: 6 deleted docs/design/html-mockups/iter-1/*.html (fake iter-1 mockups being removed). 2 untracked dirs: .claude/worktrees/, improvements/. None of these conflict with custom-iter output.
